name: Weekly CS Team Digest
description: Monday morning Slack digest with churns, renewals, escalations, and health drops pulled from Salesforce.
longDescription: Every Monday at 8 AM, runs four Salesforce queries in parallel — new churns this week, renewals closing in 7 days, accounts with recent case escalations, and accounts with no activity in 21+ days — then compiles everything into a single Block Kit Slack message for your CS team. The full weekly picture in one message.
